with Innovation and Creativity,".

eventName:
PAGTUTULUNGAN SA KINABUKASAN: IKAW, BANGKO,
INDUSTRIYA AT GOBYERNO (PAG-IBIG) FUND MEMBERSHIP
IDENTIFICATION (MID) REGISTRATION
eventDescription:
Pursuant to the initiatives of the Human Resource Management Office (HRMO), and in
collaboration with the PAGTUTULUNGAN SA KINABUKASAN: IKAW, BANGKO,
INDUSTRIYA AT GOBYERNO (PAG-IBIG) FUND, this office has solicited and secured
the conduct of PAG-IBIG Membership ID (MID) registration for personnel who have not yet
registered to effectuate the mandatory deduction of contributions from all employees concerned.
Everyone is encouraged to wear smart casual attire since all the faculty members will be introduced on the said event.
